args.name: username
args.label: Username
args.children: <input type="text" name="username" placeholder="Enter your username" class="bg-white border-2 border-gray-300 text-gray-900 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary block w-full px-4 py-3 transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400 hover:border-gray-400" />

args.name: email
args.label: Email Address
args.children: <input type="email" name="email" placeholder="your.email@example.com" class="bg-white border-2 border-gray-300 text-gray-900 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-primary block w-full px-4 py-3 transition-all placeholder:text-gray-400 hover:border-gray-400" />

args.name: password
args.label: Password
args.children: <input type="password" name="password" class="bg-white border-2 border-error text-gray-900 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-error focus:border-error block w-full px-4 py-3 transition-all" />
